title: HR Executive | Kranji (North) | Up to $2.5K
description:
Benefits:

  • Basic up to $2,500 + OT Allowance + Variable Bonus.

  • 5.5 Days (Mon–Fri: 8:30 AM – 5:30 PM | Sat: 8:30 AM – 12:30 PM).

  • Conveniently accessible via Bus 925 from Kranji MRT (4 stops).

  • Gain hands-on experience in the full spectrum of HR operations, including compliance and policy implementation.


Job Description:
We are looking for a meticulous HR Executive to manage our daily human resource functions. You will be the backbone of our personnel administration, handling everything from the initial onboarding of new hires to managing work pass renewals and insurance claims. This role offers a great opportunity to work closely with management to refine HR policies and ensure our workplace remains compliant and efficient.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Maintain accurate records for hiring, terminations, transfers, and leave.

  • Manage HR paperwork for recruitment, training, performance reviews, and grievances.

  • Conduct new employee orientations and explain company policies and benefits.

  • Handle the application, renewal, and cancellation of work passes for foreign employees.

  • Manage workplace insurance and WICA documentation, including processing claims.

  • Assist management with interview processes, performance evaluations, and the development of HR procedures.

Requirements:

  • Preferably a Diploma in Human Resource Management, Business Administration, or a related field.

  • Minimum 1–2 years of relevant HR or administrative experience.

  • Familiarity with Singapore employment regulations (e.g., Work Passes, WICA, Employment Act) is a strong advantage.

  • Proficient in HR operations and documentation; strong communication skills to handle employee inquiries.

  • High integrity, proactive, and able to work in a fast-paced environment.

postedCompany.description:
Recruit Now Singapore Pte Ltd | EA No: 21C0845


We provide solutions to all recruitment needs as well as HR services for a range of industries in Singapore. Our clients varying from well-known and established corporations to up-and-coming start-ups, put their trust in our services to provide the most efficient and effective results for recruitment and HR services. Supporting the exponential growth of our clients is and always will be what we strive for. 


We have a team of well-equipped recruiters who are dedicated to placing job seekers with the best-suited companies. We make sure our recruiters at Recruit Now are well-educated on employment laws, job market and skillsets needed for respective industries to ensure a meticulous selection process in recruitment and safe employment. 


Take your first step in finding your career.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT NOW SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
